query.description: the developer's general question, substituted for {query}

context.description: the synthesized context block (main + related elements), substituted for {context}

checks: response provides relevant analysis and recommendations for the supplied element in context

provider.notes: the 'general' (default) entry of AIPromptGenerator.getTemplate(); composed by applyTemplate() substituting {query}/{context} (lowercase single-brace; not scannable — form=composed). Tokens declared honestly for documentation.
